name: Hawaiian Spam Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into thin squares (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 13x9 inch baking pan.
3. Unroll the dough and press it into the prepared pan.
4. Spread the cheese evenly over the dough.
5. Arrange the remaining ingredients (SPAM, pineapple, red onion, green pepper) over the cheese.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is deep golden brown. Serves 6.
